texts: Reworked the bumps system for reviews into a more standard upvotes and funny votes system similar to Steam reviews. Existing reviews with bumps have been given a score equivalent to their bumps.

body.text: Apologies for temporarily breaking the reviews section while I was working on this. It was an unfortunate side effect of some changes I was doing in the database, so I had to rush this update out to fix it. If there are some parts of the new system not working properly, I'll get to fixing it as soon as I can.
